name: Afterglow Valley
summary: A polished Fabric 1.20.1 cozy exploration survival pack focused on scenic terrain, village restoration, cottage building, farming, cooking, wildlife, ambience, comfortable travel, storage progression, and light mystery without horror, tech bloat, or combat pressure.

mods.reason_selected: performance_foundation renderer performance for scenic terrain and decorated settlements
performance_foundation broad gameplay and server optimization
performance_foundation memory reduction for long cozy survival worlds
performance_foundation startup, memory, and stability fixes
performance_foundation client rendering speedups
performance_foundation reduce hidden entity rendering cost in villages and decorated homes
performance_foundation Sodium compatibility for Fabric rendering API building and decor mods
client_qol mod configuration discovery
client_qol readable block, crop, storage, and entity information
inventory_management recipe and item discovery across cooking, storage, and decoration
client_qol food value clarity for cooking progression
inventory_management smoother inventory interactions without adding risky sorting systems
inventory_management container visibility while traveling and building
beautiful_worldgen scenic vanilla-style terrain without stacking multiple full biome overhauls
villages improved settlements that feel worth visiting, restoring, and connecting with roads
light_structures small discoveries, ruins, and landmarks without boss-heavy adventure bloat
light_structures vanilla-style structure variety for relaxed journeys
animals wildlife that makes forests, rivers, and valleys feel alive
visual_polish gentle particles and ambient detail
ambience relaxing biome ambience and immersive soundscape
soundscape spatial audio for caves, cottages, forests, and villages
soundscape grounded travel and building ambience
cozy_building_blocks large palette for cottages, workshops, barns, docks, and village streets
cozy_building_blocks decorative variants for long-term building projects
decoration functional cozy details that make homes and villages feel lived in
decoration vanilla block improvements that complement Supplementaries
furniture restrained furniture for cozy interiors
furniture richer furniture for kitchens, inns, workshops, and cottages
cozy_building_blocks bridges and paths for rivers, roads, and scenic infrastructure
cozy_building_blocks home and village exterior variety
cozy_building_blocks cozy home and workshop detailing
cozy_building_blocks cottage, barn, and village roof shapes
cozy_building_blocks gardens, pastures, farms, and settlement boundaries
farming cooking core kitchen and homestead progression
backpack/mobile storage for scenic expeditions
base storage simple storage network progression without factory bloat
map_tools local navigation for scenic exploration and settlement planning
map_tools long-term world memory and route planning
compass/discovery tools biome finding for beautiful build sites without quest bloat
comfortable travel between homes, villages, and scenic outposts while preserving journey by discovery
comfortable travel sleeping bags for long journeys without resetting spawn

notes: Curated for cozy exploration and settlement life: no Create-style tech chain, no horror, no guns, no boss RPG path. Croptopia and Croptopia Delight were not included because the allowed source/dependency closure check could not acquire Croptopia in this environment. Inventory Profiles Next is intentionally excluded initially because it has known runtime risk in this project history; Mouse Tweaks and Shulker Box Tooltip cover low-risk inventory quality of life.
